evals.expected_output: Lists all tunnels with names, IPs, servers, and connection status
expectations: Calls list_tunnels with the user's auth token
Displays tunnel name, assigned IP, server, and connection status
Presents output in a readable format

evals.prompt: Add a new device called Work Laptop on the London server
evals.expected_output: Creates a tunnel named Work Laptop on the London server
expectations: Calls servers endpoint to find the London server hostname
Calls create_tunnel with name=Work Laptop and the correct server
Shows the created tunnel's assigned IP and tunnel token
Offers to get the WireGuard config for the new tunnel

evals.prompt: Move my Home Server tunnel to the EU
evals.expected_output: Updates the tunnel's server to an EU location
expectations: Lists tunnels to find the Home Server tunnel token
Calls servers endpoint to show EU server options
Calls update_tunnel with the new server
Warns that the WireGuard config will change and needs reinstalling

evals.prompt: Delete the tunnel called Test Device
evals.expected_output: Deletes the specified tunnel after confirmation
expectations: Lists tunnels to find Test Device's tunnel token
Calls delete_tunnel with the correct tunnel token
